metadata.name: Find Owner of a Found Item

description: A wallet is found with an ID inside. A guest services agent needs to attempt to contact the owner.

nodes.task_description: Log the found wallet in the lost and found database, including the name on the ID.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a new found item record.

nodes.task_description: Search the ticketing system's order history for a guest with the matching name who attended the event.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds a ticket order with a matching name and retrieves the guest's contact information (email and phone number).

nodes.task_description: Contact the guest via phone or email to inform them their wallet has been found.
Arrange a time for the guest to come to the venue to pick up the wallet.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent schedules a pickup time and provides instructions.
